did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.unittitle: Street trees: their care and preservation,

did.abstract: Typescript manuscript with photographs, annotated by Liberty Hyde Bailey. Published by Cornell University College of Agriculture Dept. of Rural Art (Extension Work) as Bulletin 256.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
